notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Oneil Cruz steals (10) 2nd base. Oneil Cruz to 3rd. Oneil Cruz advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Danny Jansen.

notableEvents.label: Jake Mangum GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum grounds into a double play, second baseman Josh Smith to shortstop Corey Seager to first baseman Jake Burger. Nick Gonzales out at 2nd. Jake Mangum out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Konnor Griffin reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Corey Seager. Jake Mangum to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Konnor Griffin reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Corey Seager. Jake Mangum to 2nd.
